entities.description: Regions of the genome associated with a particular quantitative trait

entities.description: An essential micronutrient targeted for increase in cereal crops

entities.description: The process of identifying genomic regions linked with biofortification traits

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using DNA markers to select for desired traits

entities.name: HIDDEN HUNGER
entities.description: A form of malnutrition characterized by a lack of micronutrients
